deep_dive.title: Adaptive, Matrix-Free Low-Rank Approximation
deep_dive.abstract: We study fixed-tolerance low-rank approximation in the matrix-free setting, where a matrix or linear operator $\mathbf{A}$ is accessible only through matrix-vector products and its rank must be determined adaptively to meet a prescribed error tolerance. We introduce a family of adaptive, matrix-free randomized QB algorithms. A randomized error indicator estimates the residual norm -- in either the Frobenius or the spectral norm -- directly from a random sketch, remaining accurate down to machine precision. A matrix-free rank-pruning step decouples the computational block size from the final rank, so that large, BLAS-3-friendly blocks can be used without over-estimating the rank, and an adjoint-free variant returns the orthonormal basis using only the forward operator. Across test matrices with diverse singular-value decays, the proposed methods attain ranks close to the truncated-SVD optimum while meeting the prescribed tolerance with high probability.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: adaptive matrix-free low-rank approximation directly applicable to low-rank denoising methods
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 自适应无矩阵低秩近似可直接用于低秩去噪方法
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 自适应无矩阵低秩近似可直接用于低秩去噪方法
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 自适应无矩阵低秩近似可直接用于低秩去噪方法
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces a family of adaptive matrix-free randomized QB algorithms for fixed-tolerance low-rank approximation, with a randomized error indicator that accurately estimates residual norms, enabling efficient low-rank denoising.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究固定容差的无矩阵低秩近似问题，即仅通过矩阵-向量乘积访问矩阵并自适应确定秩以满足误差。提出一系列自适应无矩阵随机QB算法，包括一个随机误差指示器可直接估计残差范数（Frobenius或谱范数），且精度可达机器精度。另外设计了无矩阵秩剪枝步骤，解耦计算块大小与最终秩，可用大块而不高估秩。该方法可用于图像去噪中的低秩近似，为高光谱图像去噪中的低秩表示提供高效工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文研究固定容差的无矩阵低秩近似问题，即仅通过矩阵-向量乘积访问矩阵并自适应确定秩以满足误差。提出一系列自适应无矩阵随机QB算法，包括一个随机误差指示器可直接估计残差范数（Frobenius或谱范数），且精度可达机器精度。另外设计了无矩阵秩剪枝步骤，解耦计算块大小与最终秩，可用大块而不高估秩。该方法可用于图像去噪中的低秩近似，为高光谱图像去噪中的低秩表示提供高效工具。
